# UiPath.DocumentUnderstanding.Common.SDK

> activity catalog — fetch a version JSON to get all data needed for XAML generation

- [2.4.1](2.4.1.json)
- [2.4.0](2.4.0.json)
- [2.3.0](2.3.0.json)
- [2.1.0](2.1.0.json)

- [1.3.2](1.3.2.json)
- [1.3.1](1.3.1.json)
